name: psychological-review-skills
description: An opinionated theory-development skill stack for Psychological Review — the APA's flagship journal for new theory and formal/computational models, which publishes NO primary empirical reports (data only motivate or constrain theory).

plugins.name: psychological-review-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill theory-development bundle for Psychological Review, the APA's new-theory/formal-model flagship. Theory-problem framing, formal/conceptual model construction, prediction derivation against rival models and existing data, scope and boundary conditions, model diagrams and simulation-of-model-behavior exhibits, APA style, contribution differentiation, and masked review via Editorial Manager. NO primary empirical reports — that is the lane of the JEP family / Psychological Science.
